description: Tracks web-design command execution statistics — agent count, media generated, timing. Scoped to /web-design via marker file.

hooks.prompt: Check if /tmp/web-design-stats/active exists. If it does NOT exist, do nothing — just stop normally. If it DOES exist, read /tmp/web-design-stats/events.log and /tmp/web-design-stats/start_time, then print a formatted statistics summary table showing: total time, agents spawned (with breakdown by type), pages built, components created, design docs, images (AI generated vs stock sourced), videos, and audio. Use a clean bordered table format. After printing, delete /tmp/web-design-stats/active so it doesn't re-trigger.
